name: Short Drama Screenwriter
description: Curated Claude Code skill for short-drama screenwriting. Comprehensive workflow from topic to episodes with professional screenplay guidelines, dual-mode support (Chinese domestic + international markets), and quality assurance pipeline.
review: Polished, production-ready skill bridging OpenClaw/Claude Code with professional short-drama screenwriting. Comprehensive workflow with substantive reference material covering genre theory, pacing, narrative hooks, and compliance. Security-conscious with safe install scripts.
